action.reasoning: Observation: current local validation reaches 0.125 with Qwen available, while isolated eval previously fell back to heuristics because /data/base_model was not available. Analysis: before changing code or copying large files, I need inspect current model path resolution and base model size/files to decide the safest packaging approach. Decision: inspect model.py/predict.py checkpoint resolution and disk usage for the local Qwen snapshot.
action.command:
sed -n '1,260p' model.py && printf '
--- predict ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' predict.py && printf '
--- base model size/files ---
' && du -sh /data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct checkpoints/baseline || true && find /data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f %s
' | sort | head -80
